name: have
description: HappyVertical agent workflow adapters for Codex. Provides skills for have:ship and have:review-cycle by loading the authoritative workflow prompts/resources from ContextForge.

interface.shortDescription: ContextForge-backed review and shipping workflows for HappyVertical projects
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex-visible skills for have:review-cycle and have:ship. The skills are thin adapters that load the authoritative workflow prompts/resources from ContextForge in the Happy Vertical team.
defaultPrompt: Use have:review-cycle for repeat reviews and fixes.
Use have:ship to validate, review, PR, and watch CI.
